## Severity

<!-- How critical is this? -->

- [ ] 🔴 **Critical** — Blocks core functionality, no workaround
- [ ] 🟡 **Major** — Significant issue, workaround exists
- [ ] 🟢 **Minor** — Cosmetic or edge case, does not block usage
